---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["type: feature"]
assignees: ""
---

## ✨ Feature Title
Give the feature a short clear name.

---

## 📌 Description
Describe the feature clearly.

---

## 🎯 Goal / Purpose
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

---

## 👥 Target Users
Who benefits from this feature?

- [ ] Guest / Visitor
- [ ] Member
- [ ] Officer / Admin
- [ ] Developers / Maintainers

---

## 🧩 Module Category
Which module does this belong to?

- [ ] Membership System
- [ ] Officer Application
- [ ] Skill Builder Application
- [ ] Events
- [ ] Blog
- [ ] Resource Hub
- [ ] Leaderboard / Gamification
- [ ] Certified Members
- [ ] Testimonials
- [ ] UI/UX Enhancement
- [ ] Backend / API Enhancement
- [ ] DevOps / Deployment
- [ ] Other: ___________

---

## 🖼️ UI/UX References (If available)
Attach:
- wireframe screenshots
- Figma link
- sample layout ideas

---

## 🔧 Technical Requirements
If you know technical details, list them here.

### Frontend Requirements
- [ ] New page needed
- [ ] New component needed
- [ ] Responsive design needed
- [ ] Form validation required

### Backend Requirements
- [ ] API endpoint needed
- [ ] Authentication needed
- [ ] Role-based access control needed
- [ ] File upload required

### Database Requirements
- [ ] New collection/table required
- [ ] Update schema required

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
This feature will be considered done when:

- [ ] UI matches design requirements
- [ ] Works on mobile and desktop
- [ ] Fully functional and tested
- [ ] Proper error handling exists
- [ ] Feature is documented (if needed)

---

## ⚡ Priority Level
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

## 📝 Additional Notes
Any extra information, edge cases, or ideas.
